/usr/bin/clang -g CMakeFiles/toy.dir/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/scanner.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/tokens.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/fileio.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/errors.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/hash.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/ast.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/ast_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/pointer_list.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/string_buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/context.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/trace.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/symbol.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/symbol_table.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/sym_reference.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/func_reference.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/type_table.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/dump_symbols.c.o CMakeFiles/toy.dir/emit_code.c.o -o /home/chuck/src/toy/bin/toy
